title: fix: restore IntraMind/AlessiaBot app row for @Goddino-Repo
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Justice for AlessiaBot
gist.blurb: We fixed a tiny paperwork glitch that accidentally hid IntraMind and AlessiaBot from the app registry. @Goddino-Repo is officially back to Flower tier where they belong!
gist.summary: Restored the missing IntraMind / AlessiaBot app entry for @Goddino-Repo in the community apps registry.
gist.impact: This fixes an issue where the user was incorrectly demoted, ensuring their app is properly showcased and their Flower tier status is restored.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee (wearing a tiny gardener's apron) carefully replanting a beautiful glowing flower (representing the Flower tier) into a lime green pot labeled 'AlessiaBot'. The Nomnom creature watches happily.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's apron, carefully replanting a beautiful glowing pink flower into a lime green (#ecf874) pot labeled 'AlessiaBot'. The round Nomnom creature watches happily nearby. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's apron, carefully replanting a beautiful glowing pink flower into a lime green (#ecf874) pot labeled 'AlessiaBot'.
